image:image.image:title: CRUMS Leasing - Trailer Leasing Solutions
image:image.image:caption: CRUMS Leasing provides flexible trailer leasing and rental solutions for carriers across the United States

image:image.image:title: Dry Van Trailer
image:image.image:caption: 53-foot enclosed dry van trailer for general freight hauling

image:image.image:title: Flatbed Trailer
image:image.image:caption: Open-deck flatbed trailer for oversized and heavy cargo

image:image.image:title: Refrigerated Trailer
image:image.image:caption: Temperature-controlled reefer trailer for perishable goods

image:image.image:caption: 53-foot enclosed dry van trailer for general freight

image:image.image:caption: Open-deck flatbed trailer for oversized cargo

image:image.image:title: Dry Van Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: 53-foot and 48-foot enclosed dry van trailers for lease with swing and roll-up door options

image:image.image:title: Flatbed Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: Standard and step deck flatbed trailers for heavy and oversized cargo hauling

image:image.image:title: Refrigerated Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: Temperature-controlled reefer trailers with multi-zone capability for perishable freight

image:image.image:title: CRUMS Trailer Rentals
image:image.image:caption: Short-term trailer rental options for carriers

image:image.image:caption: Comprehensive fleet management and leasing solutions

image:image.image:title: Dry Van Trailer - Choosing the Right Trailer Guide
image:image.image:caption: Enclosed dry van trailers for general freight - most common trailer type in trucking

image:image.image:caption: Open-deck flatbed trailers for oversized and heavy cargo
